description_long: This is a single, upright gas pump with a rectangular display and a sturdy metal base, designed for self-service fueling. The front panel features a digital price display for both diesel and unleaded fuel, with clear yellow numbers on a dark background. Two black fuel hoses with blue nozzles are mounted on either side, and the pump is labeled with a large white number '8' and the word 'FUEL' on a blue background. The top of the pump displays a 'SELF-SERVICE' sign, and several safety and warning stickers are visible on the front and sides. The structure appears weathered, with some signs of wear and dirt, indicating frequent use in an outdoor urban environment.
description: A weathered, self-service gas pump with digital price displays, dual hoses, and prominent blue and white labeling.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back panel, a single hose and nozzle, and warning stickers.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the digital price board, 'SELF-SERVICE' sign, dual hoses, and large blue '8 FUEL' label.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to view 0, highlighting the back panel and a single hose.
description_view_3: Front view identical to view 1, with clear visibility of the price board, signage, and both hoses.
attribute_fuel_pumps: One upright, vintage-style fuel pump with two black hoses and blue nozzles mounted on either side. The pump is primarily white with blue accents and features a digital price display. No visible branding beyond the number '8' and the word 'FUEL'.
attribute_station_signage: Signage includes a 'SELF-SERVICE' sign at the top, a large white '8' and the word 'FUEL' on a blue background on the lower front, and several small safety and warning stickers on the front and sides. All signage is integrated into the pump structure.
attribute_price_display_board: A digital price display board is integrated into the upper front of the pump, showing prices for diesel and unleaded fuel in yellow numbers. Four price listings are visible, with currency symbols and units clearly displayed.
